Trip notes
📝
Pack & Prep
Tap to expand
• Reef-safe sunscreen, kids' rash guards
• Bug spray with DEET (La Fortuna is humid)
• Light rain jackets — afternoon showers likely
• Cash in colones for small towns & tips
• Print Vamos confirmation #68418
• Download offline Google Maps for Nicoya
